series_description: All documents relating to application approval, signed contractural agreements providing services to Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development Foundation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced and of no agency value

series_description: Vacany postings and applications, any required civil service data along with interview questions for applicants.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 months after position filled or decision not to fill the position is made, when no longer of agency value, destroy.

series_description: List of positions within SOACDF''s agency by position control number, including both filled and vacant positions. Used for budget and personnel purposes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year or until superseded, audited by Auditor of State and audit released, when no longer of agency value, destroy

series_description: Organizational chart of Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development Foundation Staff.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded or of no agency value

series_title: Payroll Warrant Records and Payroll Disbursement Records
series_description: Payroll records provided from OAKS system reporting module for Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development review and annual audit by Auditor of State.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, move to agency archive file and retain 2 years or until no longer of agency value

series_description: File contains record data of personnel used by Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development Foundation during heavy work load times and authorized by agency Director.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after expiration of contract, audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, when no longer of agency value

series_description: Resumes of individuals and letters of recommendation received by Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 6 months, or no longer of agency value

series_description: Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development Foundation position descriptions and hiring requirements.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded or classification abolished and no longer of agency value

series_description: Copies of audit reports issued by the Auditor of State
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years until superseded or no longer of agency value

series_description: Purchase orders issued by Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development Foundation for supplies and other related products.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, move to archive file retain 2 years, when no longer of agency value, destroy.

series_description: Internal record of Agency assets
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after asset is sold or sent to State Salvage

series_description: The records document of the process of awarding and administering the grant programs, which utilize SOACDF budgeted funds. The files include applications, review tools, funding recommendation, copy of award letter, letter of thanks for participation in program and copy of award check.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in active files for 3 years, move to archive files and retain until no longer of agency value

series_description: OBM 7293 Form. Covers reimbursements to employees for infrequent or emergency purchases.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in active file for 1 year, move to archive files and retain until no longer of agency value, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Memoranda, flyers, catalogues, registration forms, rosters and other records relating to training courses run by a data processing user support or automation support unit.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Seasonal personnel to assist with SOACDF''s internal office needs.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after the completion of the work, and audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved.

series_title: Files from OAKS HCM System regarding employees
series_description: Electronically submitted data for bi-weekly leave requests, and payroll for agency employees
retention_statement: Paper: Retain by agency Director until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, and of no agency value

series_title: SOACDF Accounting Descriptions, Expenditure Ledger and Revenue
series_description: SOACDF''s Monthly and annual accounting/expenditure/revenue records not stored in OAKS System or COGNOS Reporting System.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1year in active files until audited by Auditor of State

series_title: Request for Stop, Release or Cancellation of Warrant
series_description: Copies of requests to have open warrants stopped, cancelled or released.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, move to agency retain 1 year, when no longer of agency value

series_description: Reports for Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development Foundation budget preparation, agency budget development and monthly reports.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, move to archive file retain 1 year or no longer of agency value

series_title: SOACDF Custodial reports, and Star Fund Reports
series_description: SOACDF Custodial reports; Star Ohio and KeyBank reports specific to Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development Foundation cash flow not held in OAKS system.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, or no longer of agency value

series_description: Monthly Series approved by SOA''''''''s Board along with work papers created by SOACDF in preparation for annual Audit by State of Ohio. SOA data not stored in OAKS or COGNOS
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, move to agency acrhive until nolonger of agency value

series_title: Financial Disclosure Statements & Joint Legislative and Ethics Commission "JLEC" Statements
series_description: Personal financial information required to be filed with the "Ohio Ethics" Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years or of no agency value

series_description: Includes published reports, unpublished substantive reports and policy studies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Formal opinions and informal opinions issued to state agencies with all pertinent materials attached thereto.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative or legal value to agency

series_description: Information on SOACDF''''''''s data processing equipment, software and other related products and related vendors.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report released and of no agency value

series_description: SOACDF''s insurance policies covering vehicles, office equipment, building rental, and Executive Director''s bonding papers as required by SOACDF''s Board of Directors
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced and of no agency value

series_description: Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development Foundation''s budget presented to OBM for biennium executive budget
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until end of the Biennium and budget is no longer in effect, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
